news.t: Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year
Pacer ETFs Celebrates 7th Birthday, Year of Rapid Growth Amid Market Challenges
Pacer ETFs Launches New ETF Targeting Opportunities in Online Gambling, Video Game and eSports Industries

holdings.infoBox: ODDS is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Evolution AB stock at 9.68%, DraftKings at 8.86%, Flutter Entertainment at 7.82%, Tencent Holdings at 6.54%, and Entain at 4.30%.

overview.description: The Pacer BlueStar Digital Entertainment ETF (ODDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of globally-listed companies that focuses on the digital entertainment industry, including online gambling, video gaming, content streaming, and eSports. ODDS was launched on Apr 8, 2022 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: BlueStar Global Online Gambling, Video Gaming and eSports Index

data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs celebrates an incredible year of growth driven by its suite of strategy-driven, rules-based ETFs, capped off by the outstanding achievement of reaching $19....

data.title: Pacer ETFs Celebrates 7th Birthday, Year of Rapid Growth Amid Market Challenges
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AUM--Pacer ETFs celebrates 7th birthday surpassing $15 billion in assets under management

data.title: Pacer ETFs Launches New ETF Targeting Opportunities in Online Gambling, Video Game and eSports Industries
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $ODDS #ETF--Pacer ETFs debuts new fund providing exposure to online gambling, video game and eSports industries as consumer demand heats up in these areas.
